name: Barbeque Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim meat and cut into strips about 2 inches wide and 6 inches long.
2. Combine remaining ingredients in a bowl; pour over pork and marinate for at least 2 hours.
3. Skewer pork with steel hangers and hang on the top rack of the oven, over a shallow roasting pan containing a few inches of water.
4. Preheat the oven to 425°F for 10 minutes.
5. Roast pork for 20 minutes.
6. With a baster, coat the pork with drippings every 5 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 325°F and roast for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Slice each strip diagonally against the grain into 1/4-inch pieces.
9. Serve cold. Dip with Chinese hot mustard and sesame seeds.
